summary: Plan repair for canonical PR #92902. The hydrated artifact shows #92902 is open, maintainer-editable, two-file scoped, but merge-conflicting/dirty with a failing Real behavior proof. Current main still lacks preferOver-aware same-origin replacement channel schema ownership in src/config/channel-config-metadata.ts, while the PR patch is stale against current ownership metadata. Unrelated open candidates stay independent.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #92902 so replacement channel plugins that declare preferOver keep ownership of the active channel config schema deterministically on current main.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(config): repair replacement channel schema ownership
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #92902 on current main so same-origin replacement channel plugins that declare `preferOver` keep ownership of active channel config schemas.
- Preserve schema ownership diagnostics (`schemaPluginId` / `schemaPluginOrigin`) while adding deterministic preferOver-aware replacement behavior.
- Keep the patch scoped to `src/config/channel-config-metadata.ts` and focused regression coverage in `src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts` unless the proof identifies a minimal adjacent test harness change.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/92884.
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92902 by @YonganZhang. This repair carries forward that contribution and credit.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts src/plugins/channel-plugin-ids.test.ts src/cli/config-cli.test.ts src/config/runtime-schema.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Rerun Real behavior proof for #92902 before merge consideration.
credit_notes: Preserve @YonganZhang attribution in the repaired PR body and merge notes.
Do not edit CHANGELOG.md for this normal PR; carry user-visible release-note context in the PR body or squash/merge message.
